goal: Screenshot this page. As a senior product designer, rate it /10. One-line verdict + one thing to improve. Dark SaaS dashboard.
summary:
**Design Rating: 6/10** — Tangle Cloud Shielded Pool Page

**One-line Verdict:** Professional dark SaaS dashboard with excellent color contrast (WCAG AAA) and clean typography, but critically undermined by invisible navigation active states that make it impossible to identify the current page location without checking the URL.

**One Thing to Improve:** Add clear active state indicators to the 'Shielded Pool' navigation item—implement a left accent border in brand purple (#8B5CF6), subtle background highlight (rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.1)), and/or bold font weight so users can instantly see where they are in the dashboard hierarchy at a glance.
